entity.label: Bamoth
entity.subtitle: Place
entity.description: Heights, the forty-seventh station of the Israelites (Num. 21:19, 20) in the territory of the Moabites.

nodes.label: Bamoth
nodes.description: Heights, the forty-seventh station of the Israelites (Num. 21:19, 20) in the territory of the Moabites.

verses.text: And from Mattanah to Nahaliel: and from Nahaliel to Bamoth:
And from Bamoth in the valley, that is in the country of Moab, to the top of Pisgah, which looketh toward Jeshimon.
